citationPriorities.why: Maps the highest buyer-comparison phrase to a crawlable answer page before the product landing.
Connects record-keeping pain to evidence, hours and attendance workflows.
Keeps the faith-aware differentiator tied to a visible product page.
Targets the clearest buyer-comparison query for choir directors.
Routes problem-aware search to the answer brief, then to the arranger workflow.
Pairs technical search intent with the strongest product landing.
Makes the free diagnostic the default conversion path for Brazilian B2B demand.
Captures the exact budget-allocation objection before paid traffic scales.
Connects offer-aware search to the first paid product.

caveats: FaithSchool is not legal advice, accreditation or a compliance guarantee.
CantuStudio generates musical drafts that require human review.
AgenticosCore should not scale paid acquisition before tracking and lead quality are validated.
pierrondi.dev is a portfolio and reference hub, not a substitute for professional legal, tax, medical or investment advice.
